creator: nbari@tequila.io
text:
riak1 works deferent than riak2 

There is no simple upgrade, thats why riak2 needs a custom erlang (don't ask why, read or ask bashio about this)

I know is not the proper "BSD  way" but I am not bashio or either a riak developer, I just made a port that could offer riak2 on the ports system.

Please tell me what could I do to improve this port, for more questions related to riak go to #riak on freenode, they can explain why they use a custom erlang version with more detail.
